ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chrom" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (+ or -) */,
  "tx_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the transcript */,
  "tx_end" INTEGER /* End position of the transcript */,
  "cds_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the coding sequence */,
  "cds_end" INTEGER /* End position of the coding sequence */,
  "last_exon_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the last exon */,
  "last_exon_end" INTEGER /* End position of the last exon */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the gene */,
  "last_exon_length" INTEGER /* Length of the last exon */,
  "exon_count" INTEGER /* Number of exons in the gene */,
  "intron_count" INTEGER /* Number of introns in the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the gene record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the gene record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_modifications" (
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the modification */,
  "mod_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., m6A, m5C) */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the modification */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the modification */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the modification */,
  "position_within_gene" INTEGER /* Position of the modification within the gene */,
  "enzyme" TEXT /* Enzyme responsible for the modification */,
  "impact_on_expression" TEXT /* Impact of the modification on gene expression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_modifications_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_sequences" (
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., full, last exon, pre) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence data */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sequence */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the sequence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_sequences_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Research area of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exons" (
  "exon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exon */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the exon */,
  "exon_number" INTEGER /* Exon number within the gene */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the exon */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the exon */,
  "exon_length" INTEGER /* Length of the exon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exons_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "introns" (
  "intron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intron */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the intron */,
  "intron_number" INTEGER /* Intron number within the gene */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the intron */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the intron */,
  "intron_length" INTEGER /* Length of the intron */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_introns_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcript_variants" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript variant */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the transcript variant */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript variant */,
  "tx_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the transcript */,
  "tx_end" INTEGER /* End position of the transcript */,
  "cds_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the coding sequence */,
  "cds_end" INTEGER /* End position of the coding sequence */,
  "exon_count" INTEGER /* Number of exons in the transcript variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the transcript variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcript_variants_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
